name: retry_amplification
diagnosis_desc: Tool failure triggers reattempt cascade, exponentially increasing token use.
doctor_instructions: Monitor tool call sequences for fail, retry, fail, retry patterns.
control_prompt: Call the API to get user data. If it fails, report the error.
experimental_prompt: Call the API to get user data. It fails. Retry. It fails again. Retry again. Keep retrying until you get data.
